use_cases: Showcasing featured products or portfolio items with immersive focus effect
Displaying image galleries with smooth spatial transitions on scroll
Presenting content cards with interactive hover and tap feedback
Creating product carousels for e-commerce with looping navigation
Building media galleries with auto-play and manual scroll control
ai_summary: A spatial focus carousel component featuring a center-focused item with surrounding cards that respond to scroll/wheel navigation. Uses spring physics for smooth scale and position transitions, creating an immersive depth effect. Supports loop navigation, auto-play, and responsive layouts for both desktop and mobile platforms. Ideal for showcasing featured content, products, or portfolio items with interactive hover states and tap feedback animations.
